changelog: More reliable network behavior: better switching between AP and Client mode, plus stronger recovery when Wi-Fi/hostapd has startup issues.
Improved Wi-Fi setup flow: more stable Wi-Fi scanning/connection testing and better handling of saved network settings.
Clearer network settings UX: unsaved changes are handled better, and save success/failure feedback is clearer.
Dive prep/dashboard fixes: fixed issues where diver panels or prepare state did not reset correctly after a new prepare.
At Surface event fixes: improved reliability of “At Surface” event handling (including LCD stop-dive flow).
Sensor page/data fixes: pneumo values are now shown more consistently in live sensor data; fixes for pneumo index/calibration behavior and depth display edge cases.
PTD/prep data fixes: improvements for team/detail preset consistency and diver enable/disable behavior in preparation flow.
User/password improvements: password flow refined (including minimum length checks and smoother admin password-change path).
Firmware update included: baseboard firmware updated to v0.8.
changelog_markdown:
### Changelog

- More reliable network behavior: better switching between AP and Client mode, plus stronger recovery when Wi-Fi/hostapd has startup issues.
- Improved Wi-Fi setup flow: more stable Wi-Fi scanning/connection testing and better handling of saved network settings.
- Clearer network settings UX: unsaved changes are handled better, and save success/failure feedback is clearer.
- Dive prep/dashboard fixes: fixed issues where diver panels or prepare state did not reset correctly after a new prepare.
- At Surface event fixes: improved reliability of “At Surface” event handling (including LCD stop-dive flow).
- Sensor page/data fixes: pneumo values are now shown more consistently in live sensor data; fixes for pneumo index/calibration behavior and depth display edge cases.
- PTD/prep data fixes: improvements for team/detail preset consistency and diver enable/disable behavior in preparation flow.
- User/password improvements: password flow refined (including minimum length checks and smoother admin password-change path).
- Firmware update included: baseboard firmware updated to v0.8.
